metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

hey, could you read over this college essay for me? kinda stressed about my application lol. here it is:

“From a young age, I’ve been captivated by the rhythms of my neighborhood. Growing up in Little Haiti, Miami, the vibrant colors, the lilting Creole spoken on every corner, and the constant energy of the community instilled in me a deep appreciation for cultural diversity. My summers were spent volunteering at the local community center, helping to run programs for younger children and learning from elders about the rich history of our community. This experience sparked a passion for social justice and a desire to create positive change. I believe that a college education will equip me with the tools and knowledge necessary to amplify the voices of marginalized communities and advocate for a more equitable world. I hope to study sociology and minor in political science. Also, I play dominoes competitively haha. Pretty good at it tbh. Thanks for any help! - Jamal Williams.  Miami, FL. Class of  hoping for raphael hall at umich. ily! pls help! ick lol im so nervous i think i messed up my intro sentence pls pls help me adult pls pls pls. oh and i also did debate in high school so
